score_breakdown.evidence: 420/420 tests passing with deterministic replay checks in CI.
Bandit, pip-audit, and secret scan remain mandatory CI checks.
Benchmark and load-test lanes remain green; p95 budgets still being tightened.
Coverage gate raised to 86% with package floors (api/models/simulate) and warnings-as-errors policy.
OpenAPI compatibility, readiness validation, and artifact evidence bundle added to CI.
Runbooks and readiness checks are active; ops drill cadence continues.
Engineering maturity KPI snapshot cadence and issue tracking are active.
Cross-language parity checks are stable; external deployment playbooks still expanding.

risks.summary: LightGBM feature-name warnings still require temporary allowlist entries.
risks.mitigation: Burn down warning allowlist under KPI-GAP-WARN-ALLOWLIST and enforce zero-warning goal.

risks.summary: Module coverage floors are close to threshold for simulate package.
risks.mitigation: Add targeted tests for low-coverage simulate branches before next threshold ratchet.

actions.description: Remove temporary warning allowlist for LightGBM feature-name warnings.
Raise simulate package coverage margin above 87 percent with branch-focused tests.

notes: Snapshot updated after CI quality-gate hardening (coverage floors, warning policy, docs consistency, and evidence artifacts).
